name: Cinnamon Rolls (Bechtel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine water and vegetable oil; stir in egg.
3. Gradually add yeast mixture to flour mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in cinnamon, butter, sugar until well combined.
5. Knead dough on lightly floured surface (or in a stand mixer with dough hook attachment) for 10 minutes.
6. Form dough into a ball and place in a greased bowl.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour or until doubled in size.
8. Punch down the dough; knead again briefly.
9. Roll out to desired thickness, cut into rolls, and place on ungreased baking sheets.
10. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Frost with powdered sugar mixture.
